textByHashes.9147e1aff160b56d2a0395e0bf03c7be16850ac4: No, no! 'Tis just that we need more ingredients fer enough te blanket the island!
textByHashes.4977c320a5eb76c35202546e38b4231ad71669bd: If ye'd just let us storm the granary we'd be able te take them monks out real easy like.
textByHashes.6d6b682142c87a7d81e41d2c09a93e93a364d000: Why, that thing of yers could hammer the wall down...
textByHashes.5af2ec054f0bad91ea42de87f3188444f3792a07: The sleeping gas will be ready as planned, Surgeon General. Those monks will be takin' a nap for a week when they get a whiff of it, and the experiments will not stand a chance.
